title: ListFlowsResponse
description: ListFlowsResponse schema from AWS Elemental MediaConnect API

allOf.description: The token that identifies which batch of results that you want to see. For example, you submit a ListFlows request with MaxResults set at 5. The service returns the first batch of results (up to 5) and a NextToken value. To see the next batch of results, you can submit the ListFlows request a second time and specify the NextToken value.
